data.title: Embraer's E190-E2: A Game Changer for ANA's Domestic Connectivity and Sustainability
data.description:
Embraer's E190-E2 aircraft has been selected by Japan's ANA Group, marking a significant step towards enhancing domestic connectivity and sustainability for the airline. ANA has placed a firm order for 15 E190-E2 aircraft with options for an additional five, set to be deployed on domestic routes starting in 2028. This strategic move aligns with ANA's long-term growth strategy, focusing on improving domestic connectivity and passenger comfort while committing to sustainable aviation.



The E190-E2's size and capacity complement ANA's existing fleet, bridging the gap between larger narrowbodies and regional jets. With a seating capacity of 97 passengers in a two-class configuration, the E190-E2 is ideal for connecting smaller cities and regional routes, allowing ANA to optimize its fleet and better match capacity to demand on various routes. This optimization will improve overall operational efficiency and profitability.

The E190-E2's advanced technologies, such as its sophisticated aerodynamics, cutting-edge wing design, and new technologies, deliver a 25% decrease in carbon emissions and fuel burn compared to the previous generation E-Jets. This improved fuel efficiency will help ANA reduce its operating costs and contribute to its sustainability goals. Additionally, the E190-E2 is certified to fly with blends of up to 50% sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and has demonstrated the engine's operability with 100% SAF, further reinforcing Embraer's commitment to emissions reduction and sustainable aviation.



The E190-E2's spacious, quiet cabin with Embraer's signature two-by-two seating and larger windows will provide passengers with a more comfortable and enjoyable experience, potentially leading to increased passenger satisfaction and loyalty. This can have a positive impact on ANA's profitability by attracting more passengers and encouraging repeat business.

In conclusion, Embraer's E190-E2 aircraft is a strategic addition to ANA's fleet, complementing its existing aircraft and enhancing domestic connectivity. The E190-E2's advanced technologies and commitment to sustainability align with ANA's long-term growth strategy, ultimately contributing to improved operational efficiency and profitability. As ANA continues to invest in its fleet and expand its network, the E190-E2 will play a crucial role in its ongoing success.

data.title: DTX Exchange Concludes Presale at $0.36, Raising $15.1M
data.description:
DTX Exchange, a pioneering asset trading platform, has concluded its presale with a final token price set at $0.36. The platform has raised over $15.1 million during the presale, attracting a community of over 600,000 members. DTX Exchange aims to provide a multi-asset trading environment, offering access to crypto, forex, ETFs, and stock trading.

DTX Exchange is the first crypto-native trading platform designed to bridge the gap between traditional finance and decentralized trading. The hybrid exchange consolidates over 120,000 asset types under a single umbrella, offering unprecedented flexibility to traders. Key features of the platform include multi-asset trading, trading leverage, the Phoenix Wallet, and tokenized ETFs.

The platform's growth has been remarkable, with over $15.1 million raised during the presale round. In less than 100 days after launch, DTX Exchange has successfully sold over 10 rounds and is currently in the final round of the presale. Listings on data tracking platforms CoinMarketCap and CoinGecko are already live, with further details regarding availability on centralized exchanges expected to be announced in the coming weeks.

The DTX Exchange team has set the final presale token price at $0.36, representing a 200% increase from the current price of $0.18 in the bonus round. The token distribution includes 50% for presale, 23% for ecosystem development, 20% for liquidity and listings, 10% for the team, 5% for advisors, and 2% for the airdrop. Investors interested in DTX can currently participate in the public presale.

The DTX team remains committed to continuous innovation and strategic expansion, with upcoming developments expected to push the platform to new heights. This is the final opportunity for investors to join the groundbreaking project before its official launch.

data.title: Huobi Bolsters Security Amidst Crypto Exchange Hacks; Bybit Loses $1.1M in Latest Attack
data.description:
Huobi, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, has responded to recent reports of hackers stealing coins through "red packet" transactions. Users have become aware of compromised Binance accounts, raising concerns about the security of their digital assets.

In a statement, Huobi emphasized its commitment to user security and reassured customers that it is taking the necessary steps to address the issue. The exchange has implemented additional security measures, including enhanced account verification and two-factor authentication, to protect users' funds.

Meanwhile, Bybit, another major cryptocurrency exchange, has been in the spotlight due to a recent hack. The exchange has reported that an address holding 12.61 cbBTC, valued at approximately $1.11 million, has been liquidated. SlowMist, a blockchain security firm, has confirmed that the Bybit attacker has used THORChain to transfer over 70,000 ETH to the Bitcoin network.

The recent market volatility has also raised concerns about potential liquidations. If ETH drops below $1793, a total of approximately $340 million, spanning 3 large positions, will be liquidated. This could have significant implications for the overall market and investors' portfolios.

As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, exchanges and investors must remain vigilant against potential security threats. Huobi's response to the recent hack highlights the importance of robust security measures and user awareness in protecting digital assets. The industry must work together to ensure the safety and stability of the market, particularly in the face of increasing market volatility.

data.title: XRP Plunges 18.5%: Analyst Predicts Further Decline to $1.65
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market experienced a significant downturn on February 25, with hundreds of millions of dollars in value erased across various digital assets. Bitcoin (BTC) fell below $89,000 for the first time since November, while Ethereum (ETH) dipped below $2,400 for the first time since October. XRP, one of the most prominent tokens in the market, was not spared from the decline, losing 18.50% in the last seven days to reach a price of $2.11 at the time of this report.

XRP's price chart indicates a potential for further decline, as the token has lost its critical support level near $2.30. On-chain analyst Ali Martinez predicts a potential fall to lows not seen since the early days of the Donald Trump re-election rally. In a recent post, Martinez explained that XRP is breaking out of its previously established ascending parallel channel, targeting $1.65, which suggests a further 22% downside is likely ahead.

The core reason for XRP's downside appears not to be related to the token itself but is likely to have a significant impact on its performance in the foreseeable future. The token's previous bullish setup, which had the potential to take it back above $3 and possibly to new highs, was highly dependent on the now-lost $2.30 support level. However, there remains a chance that the XRP plunge will not be as severe, as the token still has support near $2.08 and near $1.85.

The strength of the bearish momentum affecting the entire cryptocurrency market makes it difficult to gauge just how low XRP could collapse. By press time on February 25, the total digital assets' market capitalization had collapsed approximately $100 billion within just 24 hours. A lack of a clear reason behind the market's downturn also makes it difficult to assess its eventual impact, though it appears likely that the causes were external, such as President Donald Trump's confirmation of planned tariffs against Mexico and Canada.

Historically, digital assets have had both positive and negative reactions to seemingly unrelated events. The great rally of 2024 and 2025 was primarily driven by Donald Trump's re-election, while other external events, such as the Silicon Valley plunge and Iran

data.title: Crypto Bloodbath: $1.5B Liquidated, Bybit's ETH Surge Amid Market Turmoil
data.description:
In the past 24 hours, the total value of liquidated positions across all networks has exceeded $1.5 billion, with 394,000 people being liquidated. This significant event has raised concerns about the stability and security of various cryptocurrency platforms.

One of the affected platforms is Bybit, which has recently been in the news for a series of liquidations and transfers. In the past 24 hours, Bybit has bought an additional 36,893 ETH via OTC, indicating a significant increase in its Ethereum holdings. Additionally, an address holding 12.61 cbBTC has been liquidated, with a value of approximately $1.11 million. This liquidation is part of the ongoing market volatility and the impact of the recent Bybit attack.

The Bybit attack, which has been a topic of discussion in the cryptocurrency community, has seen the attacker use THORChain to transfer over 70,000 ETH to the Bitcoin network. This transfer has raised concerns about the security of the THORChain network and the potential for further attacks. As the market continues to fluctuate, the risk of liquidations remains high, with a total of approximately $340 million, spanning 3 large positions, at risk of being liquidated if ETH drops below $1793.

As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, the risk of liquidations and attacks remains a significant concern for investors and platforms alike. The recent events on Bybit and the broader market highlight the need for increased security measures and risk management strategies to protect investors and maintain the stability of the market.

data.title: SEC Reviews Solana ETFs: A New Era for Crypto Investment
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has opened reviews for four proposals for spot Solana (SOL) exchange-traded funds (ETFs), potentially paving the way for increased institutional investment in the cryptocurrency. This shift in the SEC's stance has sparked speculation about the future of Solana and its potential to reach new price highs.

The SEC's willingness to review these proposals marks a significant change from its previous reluctance to approve crypto-based investment products. Just a year ago, the regulator was cautious about approving such products. However, the approval of Bitcoin ETFs in January 2024 set a new precedent, making Solana a logical next candidate for institutional investment.

Chris Chung, founder of Solana swap platform Titan, described the SEC's change in stance as a "big about-turn," suggesting that it could lead to Solana's mass adoption. He noted that the SEC has moved from refusing to consider Solana ETFs to acknowledging Grayscale's amended SOL ETF application.

The SEC typically takes 21 days to review such filings, during which it can approve, deny, or extend the decision. Many analysts believe that Solana ETFs could be approved within the year, although the exact timeline remains uncertain. If approved, it would be a major milestone for Solana, similar to the approval of Bitcoin ETFs.

Meanwhile, PlutoChain ($PLUTO) has emerged as a hybrid Layer-2 protocol designed to potentially upgrade Bitcoin's functionality. The platform aims to address Bitcoin's core challenge of slow transaction speeds and high fees that limit its use for everyday payments.

PlutoChain's hybrid Layer-2 solution processes transactions off Bitcoin's main chain while maintaining security and decentralization. A crucial feature is EVM (Ethereum Virtual Machine) compatibility, which could allow developers to port existing Ethereum applications directly to Bitcoin's ecosystem. This includes DeFi protocols, NFT marketplaces, and AI tools, potentially making Bitcoin more attractive for innovation without requiring complete rebuilds of existing projects.

The platform emphasizes both technical security and community governance. Security measures include regular audits by firms like SolidProof, QuillAudits, and Assure DeFi, continuous internal code reviews, stress testing, and adherence to global blockchain security standards. For governance, PlutoChain takes a community-driven approach through Discord, enabling users to influence technical upgrades and strategic decisions.

Aureal One is among the new crypto presales, ready to transform the blockchain gaming landscape.

Aureal One offers more than just cryptocurrency; it creates a unified ecosystem for gaming and decentralized finance (DeFi). Users gain full ownership of virtual assets, trading and monetizing them seamlessly. Blockchain technology ensures security and transparency, enhancing trust within the metaverse. The platform optimizes transaction efficiency, making it ideal for decentralized virtual economies. With its commitment to low costs and high speed, Aureal One stands at the forefront of next-generation digital experiences.

Other notable crypto presales include DexBoss (DEBO), which introduces a new paradigm in DeFi by offering trading for over 2000 cryptocurrencies. DexBoss also offers liquidity farming and staking, rewarding users with DEBO tokens. As of February 24, 2025, DexBoss has raised $591,604.44 out of its $750,000 goal, with a current price of $0.011 and a listing price of $0.0505.

data.title: SEC Closes Robinhood Crypto Inquiry: No Enforcement Action Taken
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has concluded its investigation into Robinhood Crypto (RHC) without taking any enforcement action. The SEC's Enforcement Division notified Robinhood Crypto in an official letter on February 21, 2025, that it would not initiate an enforcement case following the completion of its inquiry. The SEC had previously issued a Wells Notice to RHC in May 2024.

Robinhood Markets Inc. welcomed the decision, with Dan Gallagher, the company's Chief Legal, Compliance, and Corporate Affairs Officer, expressing his support. Gallagher stated that the inquiry was unjustified from the beginning and that Robinhood Crypto has always complied with federal securities laws, avoiding market transactions of securities.

Robinhood Crypto has taken a conservative approach to its operations, even in the face of previous regulatory disagreements. The company has chosen not to provide services and products that the SEC has declared securities, aiming to maintain a secure regulatory position. Robinhood has also demonstrated its commitment to working with the SEC to create a transparent regulatory framework for digital assets.

The SEC's decision to close the investigation highlights the ongoing debate about crypto regulations in the market. There is broad support for definitive rules rather than regulatory actions based on enforcement. Robinhood Crypto agrees with this sentiment and will continue to work on creating new products while adhering to relevant laws.

Previously, Robinhood had settled a separate case with the SEC for $45 million, accused of violating multiple securities laws. This past regulatory scrutiny has influenced Robinhood's cautious approach in the area of cryptocurrency-related services. Despite this, regulatory clarity remains a prevalent issue in the digital asset industry, which is constantly evolving. Regulatory bodies are expected to provide a structured and fair approach to companies like Robinhood Crypto, signaling a move towards a more transparent regulatory environment.

data.title: Bitcoin Surges to New High, Topping $89,000
data.description:
Bitcoin, the world's largest cryptocurrency, surged above $89,000 on Tuesday, marking a new all-time high and extending its recent rally. The digital asset has gained over 100% in value since the beginning of the year, driven by increased institutional interest and a growing acceptance of cryptocurrencies as a viable investment option.

The latest surge in Bitcoin's price comes amidst a backdrop of increasing volatility in the cryptocurrency market. In the past 24 hours, the total market capitalization of all cryptocurrencies has surpassed $2 trillion, with Bitcoin accounting for over 50% of that total. Other major cryptocurrencies, such as Ethereum and Ripple, have also seen significant gains in recent weeks.

One of the key factors driving Bitcoin's recent rally is the increasing demand for cryptocurrencies as a hedge against inflation and currency devaluation. As central banks around the world continue to print money to stimulate economic growth, investors are turning to Bitcoin as a store of value that is not subject to the same inflationary pressures as traditional currencies.

Another factor contributing to Bitcoin's surge is the growing institutional interest in cryptocurrencies. Major financial institutions, such as Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan, have announced plans to offer cryptocurrency-related products and services to their clients. Additionally, several high-profile investors, including Paul Tudor Jones and Stanley Druckenmiller, have publicly expressed their support for Bitcoin as an investment option.

However, the recent surge in Bitcoin's price has also been accompanied by increased volatility and liquidations. According to data from Bybit, an address holding 12.61 cbBTC was liquidated with a value of approximately $1.11 million. Additionally, the Bybit attacker has used THORChain to transfer over 70,000 ETH to the Bitcoin network, further adding to the market's volatility.

Looking ahead, analysts expect Bitcoin's rally to continue, with some predicting that the digital asset could reach $100,000 or even higher in the coming months. However, the cryptocurrency market remains highly volatile, and investors should be prepared for significant price swings in both directions.

data.title: Bitcoin Plunges 7.11%, Saylor Sees Opportunity
data.description:
Bitcoin's recent 7.11% crash has sparked commentary from industry figures, with Michael Saylor, co-founder and executive chairman of Strategy, taking to Twitter to share his perspective. In a concise yet impactful tweet, Saylor stated, "Bitcoin is on sale," suggesting that the current dip presents an opportunity for investors to acquire the world's leading cryptocurrency at a discounted price.

Over the past 24 hours, Bitcoin's price trajectory has been volatile, with the cryptocurrency losing over 7% and falling below the $95,610 level to reach $88,820. Several factors contributed to this decline, including Donald Trump's impending tariffs on Canada and Mexico, massive liquidations on the crypto market, and significant outflows from spot Bitcoin ETFs, totaling approximately $552.5 million. Additionally, Elon Musk's demands for federal agency employees to report on their achievements have also been cited as a potential trigger for the market downturn.

Despite the recent market fluctuations, Saylor's company, Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), has continued to accumulate Bitcoin. In a recent tweet, Saylor announced that the company had purchased 20,356 Bitcoins for approximately $1.99 billion, paying around $97,514 per BTC. This acquisition followed the company's completion of a $2 billion offering of senior convertible notes to institutional investors, with the proceeds earmarked for Bitcoin purchases. As of now, Strategy holds a total of 449,096 BTC, valued at roughly $33.1 billion at the current BTC/USD exchange rate.

Saylor also revealed that Strategy has achieved a Bitcoin yield of 6.9% year-to-date in 2025 and confirmed the company's intention to surpass its initial target of holding 500,000 Bitcoins. With less than 1,000 BTC remaining to reach this ambitious goal, Strategy continues to be a significant player in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Bybit Boosts Ethereum Holdings Amid Market Turmoil
data.description:
Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit has made a significant purchase of Ethereum (ETH), acquiring an additional 36,893 ETH via over-the-counter (OTC) transactions just three hours ago. This move comes amidst a backdrop of increased volatility and liquidations in the cryptocurrency market.

In a separate development, an address holding 12.61 cbBTC was liquidated, with a value of approximately $1.11 million. This liquidation highlights the risks associated with leveraged trading in the volatile cryptocurrency market.

Meanwhile, security firm SlowMist has reported that the Bybit attacker has used THORChain to transfer over 70,000 ETH to the Bitcoin network. This development underscores the ongoing security challenges faced by cryptocurrency exchanges and the need for robust security measures.

Market analysts are closely monitoring the ETH price, as a drop below $1793 could trigger the liquidation of a total of approximately $340 million, spanning three large positions. This potential liquidation event could further exacerbate the market's volatility.

data.title: Bloomin' Brands: Trimming Staff, Boosting Stock
Kiniksa's Q4 Surprise: Shares Plummet 3.16% Premarket
Shutterstock's 2024 Results: A Tale of Transition and Opportunity
data.description:
Shutterstock (NYSE: SSTK), the global creative platform, has released its full-year 2024 and fourth-quarter financial results, offering investors a glimpse into the company's strategic pivot and the challenges it faces in a rapidly evolving visual content market. As Shutterstock navigates this transition, its financial performance reflects both the opportunities and the hurdles it encounters.



In 2024, Shutterstock reported record revenues of $935.3 million, a 7% increase compared to 2023. However, net income fell 67% to $35.9 million, primarily due to increased interest expenses, non-recurring tax expenses, and M&A transaction costs. Adjusted EBITDA increased 3% to $247.1 million, with a margin of 26.4%. For the fourth quarter, revenue was $250.3 million, up 15% year-over-year, with a net loss of $1.4 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, payable March 20, 2025.



Shutterstock's business mix is evolving, with the Content segment growing modestly at 3% and the Data, Distribution, and Services segment surging 28%, now representing 19% of total revenue. This pivot towards data services signals Shutterstock's strategic shift towards higher-margin, recurring revenue streams that are less susceptible to competitive pressures in the core stock image market.

However, the company faces challenges in managing integration challenges from recent acquisitions and the pending merger with Getty Images. The merger, announced on January 7, 2025, would create a dominant player in the visual content market, potentially enabling cost synergies and increased pricing power. However, it also introduces significant execution risk during a period when the company is already managing integration of recent acquisitions.

In conclusion, Shutterstock's 2024 results reveal a company in transition, with record revenue but significantly compressed profitability. The company's strategic pivot towards data services and acquisitive growth demonstrates foresight, but compressed margins and declining free cash flow indicate that the transition is not frictionless. The pending merger with Getty Images, if approved, would fundamentally transform the company's competitive position and financial profile, potentially enhancing its ability to compete in the rapidly evolving visual content market. As Shutterstock navigates this transition, investors should closely monitor the company's progress and the potential synergies and challenges that may arise from the integration process.

data.title: Home Depot Earnings Preview: What to Expect from Q4 Results
data.description:
Home Depot is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, February 20. Analysts expect earnings per share of $3.04, reflecting a 7.8 percent year-over-year increase, while revenue is projected to reach $39.15 billion, up 12.6 percent from the prior year. Investors will be closely watching key metrics such as same-store sales, which are expected to decline by approximately 2.0 percent, as well as trends in average ticket size and inventory levels.

The earnings report comes amid a backdrop of macroeconomic uncertainty, including high mortgage rates, inflationary pressures, and softer home improvement spending. Despite these challenges, analysts believe Home Depot’s performance could demonstrate early signs of recovery in the home improvement sector, with some projecting sequential improvement in sales trends heading into 2025.

Key Metrics and Drivers

Several key factors will be under scrutiny in Home Depot’s earnings report.

Same-store sales are expected to decline by around 2.0 percent, but some analysts believe there is potential for an upside surprise. Citi suggests the market is anticipating a better-than-expected print, with investors pricing in a possible 1 percent same-store sales gain.

Inventory levels will be an important factor, as any commentary on normalization will help gauge how the company is managing supply chain imbalances.

Macroeconomic pressures continue to weigh on consumer behavior. Higher interest rates and inflation have impacted discretionary spending, and Home Depot’s management commentary on demand trends will be key for setting expectations moving forward.

Seasonal demand trends may provide some tailwinds, particularly in sales linked to hurricane and wildfire rebuilding efforts, as well as seasonal holiday items.

Guidance for fiscal 2025 will be a focal point, as investors look for signals on how Home Depot expects demand to trend if macroeconomic conditions improve.

Analyst Expectations and Market Sentiment

Analysts hold a mixed but cautiously optimistic stance on Home Depot’s fourth-quarter results.

Bernstein expects comparable sales to remain negative in the quarter but sees a return to growth in fiscal 2025, forecasting a 1 percent gain over the year. However, they do not expect a meaningful rebound to the historical 4 percent growth range until fiscal 2026.

Citi has raised its estimates for Home Depot, citing better-than-expected high-frequency data. They now forecast same-store sales of 1 percent, compared to the sell-side consensus of a 2.2 percent decline.

UBS believes results from both Home Depot and Lowe’s will provide evidence that the home improvement market is stabilizing. They note that temporary factors such as rebuilding activity are helping bridge the gap to stronger demand trends. If sales remain sluggish, UBS sees this as a case of demand deferral rather than destruction, meaning a sharper recovery could occur once macro conditions improve.

Truist has also raised its comparable sales forecast for Home Depot from negative 2.0 percent to positive 0.5 percent, citing internal credit card data showing stronger spending trends.

JPMorgan recently added Home Depot to its Analyst Focus List, raising its price target from $450 to $475. They also revised their U.S. comparable store sales forecast from a decline of 2.4 percent to a gain of 1.0 percent, suggesting potential for an upside surprise.

Home Depot vs. Lowe’s: Comparing Valuations and Expectations

Home Depot’s primary competitor, Lowe’s, is set to report earnings the following day, on Wednesday, February 21. Both retailers have faced sluggish stock performance amid concerns over consumer spending, but analysts believe their earnings reports will provide more clarity on whether the sector is stabilizing.

Same-store sales expectations differ for the two companies. Home Depot is expected to post a 2.0 percent decline, while Lowe’s is projected to decline by 3.0 percent. However, Citi believes Lowe’s could surprise with a flat to negative 0.5 percent same-store sales result, signaling potential upside.

Valuations reflect Home Depot’s stronger market position, as it trades at a higher multiple than Lowe’s. Home Depot’s forward price-to-earnings ratio stands around 25.8 times projected GAAP earnings, while Lowe’s trades closer to 18 to 19 times forward earnings.

Market preference has leaned toward Home Depot over Lowe’s, with several analysts, including Citi, favoring Home Depot due to its superior execution, stable market share, and stronger professional customer base. However, Evercore ISI recently added Lowe’s to its Tactical Outperform List, arguing that the stock has more room to run if the company reaffirms its guidance.

What to Watch Post-Earnings

Forward guidance will be a key focal point. If Home Depot provides a stronger-than-expected outlook, it could signal that the home improvement sector is starting to recover. Analysts currently expect full-year 2025 earnings per share growth of 3.5 percent and revenue growth of 3.3 percent, so any deviations from this guidance will likely impact stock performance.

Market reaction will also be important to watch. Home Depot shares recently found support around their 200-day moving average, and a strong earnings report could provide momentum. Conversely, a weak print could lead to further downside pressure.

The impact on Lowe’s will also be in focus. Since Lowe’s reports earnings the day after Home Depot, its stock could react in advance based on Home Depot’s results. If Home Depot shows signs of stabilization, it could set the tone for a more favorable reaction to Lowe’s earnings.

Final Thoughts

Home Depot’s earnings report will serve as a key indicator for the broader home improvement sector, offering insights into consumer spending trends and the trajectory of housing-related demand. While expectations for the quarter remain modest, early signs of stabilization could set the stage for a gradual recovery in fiscal 2025.

With both Home Depot and Lowe’s trading near key technical levels, investors will be paying close attention to guidance updates, macro commentary, and potential upside surprises. While risks remain, particularly with inflation and mortgage rates still elevated, analysts see reasons to be constructive on home improvement stocks if demand trends continue to improve.

data.title: Are You Ready To Catch Up The 'Golden Momentum' In The Stock Market?
data.description:
Gold has reached a new record high, but this does not mean there are no more big opportunities correlated with this precious metal. In our view, the next "big deal" is hiding in plain sight - the stock market, because this company is truly poised to capitalize on this "golden momentum" and prove itself to be the perfect bet in a shifting economic landscape.

HERE ARE OUR PICKS FOR THIS WEEK!

----------------------------------------------------------

Newmont Corporation (NEM): Gold's Glimmer Amidst Volatility

Current Share Price: $44.04 

Market Capitalization: $49.31B 

Median Target Price: $52.50

Recommendation: Buy

Newmont Corporation (NEM) is a leading gold mining company, renowned for its expansive operations across multiple continents, significantly influencing the global supply of this precious metal.

Financially, Newmont stands robust with total revenue reaching $18.68 billion, reflecting a remarkable revenue growth of 42.8%. Gross profits are substantial at $9.39 billion, yielding a gross margin of 50.27%, while the EBITDA margins stand at an impressive 46.71%, demonstrating high operational efficiency. The operating margins are also strong at 40.85%.

Newmont's liquidity position is noteworthy, with total cash reserves of $3.64 billion ($3.21 per share) and a formidable operating cash flow of $6.36 billion. However, the company carries a significant debt load, with total debt amounting to $8.97 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 29.80%.

The company showcases positive profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 6.61% and a return on equity (ROE) of 11.17%, highlighting effective asset and equity management. Profit margins are strong at 17.92%, signaling an effective cost structure and profitability.

Analysts recommend a Buy rating with a mean score of 1.95. Price targets range from $45.00 to $65.43, with the median target set at $52.50. The market sentiment is positive about Newmont's ability to navigate market volatility and continue delivering strong financial performance.

Newmont Corporation offers a stable investment opportunity in the often volatile mining sector, fortified by its robust financials, operational efficiency, and significant market position, making it an attractive choice for investors seeking exposure to precious metals.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS): Data Powerhouse in Financial Analytics

Current Share Price: $461.56 

Market Capitalization: $17.50B 

Median Target Price: $486.00

Recommendation: Hold

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) is a premier provider of financial data and analytics, servicing global investment professionals with comprehensive data solutions integrated with advanced technology.

Financially, FactSet exhibits steady performance with total revenue reaching $2.23 billion, reflecting a revenue growth of 4.9%. Gross profits stand at $1.21 billion, translating to a gross margin of 54.29%, while the EBITDA margins are substantial at 38.03%, demonstrating effective operational efficiency. The operating margins are strong at 34.25%.

FactSet maintains a solid liquidity position with total cash reserves of $358.79 million ($9.43 per share) and a healthy operating cash flow of $631.57 million. The company holds moderate debt, with total debt amounting to $1.55 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 77.93%.

The company showcases commendable profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 11.16% and a return on equity (ROE) of 29.17%, indicating effective management of its assets and equity. Profit margins are robust at 24.16%, highlighting the strong profitability inherent in its business model.

Analysts have issued a Hold recommendation with a mean rating of 3.29. Price targets vary from $390.00 to $536.00, with the median target set at $486.00. The market sentiment reflects cautious optimism towards FactSet's continued growth amidst market challenges.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. remains a formidable player in the financial analytics sector, supported by steady revenue growth, strong profitability, and a well-structured financial position. It is a viable option for investors seeking exposure to the financial data and analytics market.

data.title: Graphs Worth 1000 Words: U.S Stocks Lose Steam as China Tech Takes Lead
data.description:
A Graph is worth a 1,000 words—let's take a look at some intriguing charts!

The unstoppable rally in U.S. stocks seems to be losing steam this year. The three major U.S. indices have posted only single-digit gains, underperforming both Chinese and European assets.

Adding to concerns, insider selling in U.S. stocks has been rising steadily, signaling that corporate executives are cashing out aggressively.

The 10 largest U.S. stock ETFs have recently seen a sharp outflow of funds, indicating that investors may be rotating out of U.S. equities.

Meanwhile, Chinese internet ETFs listed in the U.S. have recorded strong inflows. Led by Alibaba, Chinese tech stocks are gaining traction and may soon take over the leadership role previously held by the Magnificent 7.

Macro Outlook: Inflation Fears & Fed Policy

On the macro front, long-term U.S. inflation expectations for the next 5–10 years have climbed to a 30-year high, driven by Trump's aggressive tariff policies. The hotter-than-expected January CPI report has also cast doubt on Fed rate cuts this year.

Signs of Recovery in China's Real Estate Market

China's real estate sector is showing early signs of stabilization and recovery. Developers are once again bidding aggressively for land, reflecting a return of confidence in the property market.

According to China Index Academy, 37% of land transactions worth over ¥1 billion(approximate $0.138 Bln) this year were sold at premiums exceeding 20%. This marks a significant rebound from just 14% in 2024 and under 5% in 2023. For comparison, during the real estate boom of 2017, this figure surpassed 60%!

Notably, over 60% of developers purchasing land at premiums are state-backed enterprises (SOBs). With major private developers like Evergrande and Country Garden facing severe financial distress, SOBs have stepped in decisively to stabilize market confidence. Since the property downturn began in 2021, SOBs have consistently accounted for more than 50% of premium land acquisitions.

data.title: "Whales Bet Big on Mutuum Finance Amid Crypto Turmoil"
data.description:
Cardano and XRP whales have been quietly accumulating Mutuum Finance, a low-risk, high-reward lending platform that is gaining traction in its presale. The project has raised over $1.3 million, drawing in more than 2,560 investors, and the token is set to increase by 33.33% to $0.02 in phase 3. Phase 2 investors stand to gain a 300% return when the token officially launches at $0.06. Analysts forecast a potential surge to $1 during the next bull run, offering investors almost 67x return.

As the crypto market faces turbulence, large investors in Cardano and XRP are shifting their focus to Mutuum Finance. Cardano has slipped 75% from its ATH now trading at $0.77, as doubts linger over its long-term scalability and real-world adoption. Similarly, XRP has struggled, dropping 35% to $2.59 amid continued regulatory uncertainty. This shift signals a changing sentiment among high-net-worth investors looking to maximize returns in a volatile crypto market.

Investor interest in the MUTM presale has surged, propelling it into phase 2 with over 2,560 participants contributing more than $1,314,515 in just the first few days. As the presale progresses, the token price will continue to climb, reaching $0.06 at launch. This offers phase 2 investors an impressive 300% return. Analysts predict that once listed, Mutuum Finance could exceed $1, with upcoming exchange integrations further amplifying its appeal.

Mutuum Finance is built for long-term growth, focusing on innovation, security, and scalability. The platform utilizes predictive smart contracts to optimize lending efficiency and supports multi-chain functionality for seamless cross-network transactions. Investors can generate passive income through staking rewards, fostering sustained participation. Additionally, the introduction of a USD-pegged stablecoin will enhance stability, providing a collateral-backed asset within the ecosystem. With rising liquidity and upcoming exchange listings, Mutuum Finance is establishing itself as a premier DeFi investment.

data.title: FXGuys Lures Profit Hunters from HyperLiquid
data.description:
Profit Hunters Abandon HyperLiquid for FXGuys' Lucrative Opportunities

In the dynamic world of cryptocurrency, investors are increasingly seeking projects that offer real financial utility. As a result, many profit-driven investors are shifting away from HyperLiquid and exploring more promising alternatives. One project gaining significant traction is FXGuys, a top-performing project in the prop trading (PropFi) sector, which has already raised over $4 million in its Stage 3 presale at $0.05 per token.

FXGuys is redefining the market by offering a prop trading funding program, staking rewards, and a Trade2Earn model that directly benefits traders and investors. Unlike HyperLiquid, which focuses primarily on perpetual trading, FXGuys provides a more comprehensive and trader-focused ecosystem with higher earning potential and a structured approach to funding professional traders.

FXGuys' instant funding prop firm model allows traders to secure up to $500,000 in trading capital, an opportunity that is difficult to match. By passing trading evaluations and challenges, traders can access these funds and enjoy an 80/20 profit split in their favor, making FXGuys one of the most attractive proprietary trading firms for skilled traders.

Another major advantage FXGuys holds over HyperLiquid is its staking rewards. Investors who stake $FXG tokens earn a 20% profit and revenue share from broker trading volume, creating a passive income stream that is difficult for top DeFi coins to compete with. Additionally, FXGuys' Trade2Earn program rewards every trade with FXG tokens, boosting trading activity and volume while ensuring long-term sustainability for the ecosystem.

FXGuys offers a more flexible and decentralized trading experience compared to HyperLiquid. With no buy or sell tax and no KYC requirements, users can trade freely without restrictions, making it an ideal choice for smart prop traders seeking a seamless, high-reward system. Furthermore, FXGuys ensures immediate access to funds with same-day fiat (over 100 local currencies) or crypto deposits and withdrawals, making transactions more efficient and investor-friendly.

Beyond staking and trader funding, FXGuys is establishing itself as a broker-backed crypto prop firm with access to multiple trading platforms. Traders can choose from FXGuys Trader, MT5, Match-Trader,

data.title: "Kaspa, BONK Holders Anticipate 1Fuel Presale Boost"
data.description:
Kaspa and BONK holders are eagerly anticipating the 1Fuel presale, with expectations running high that it could significantly boost the price of KAS. Both projects have been gaining traction, with Kaspa's upcoming upgrades and BONK's growing community hype driving interest. Meanwhile, 1Fuel's innovative DeFi features and highly anticipated exchange listing have sparked investor curiosity.

The Kaspa coin has been trading at $0.09811, with a market capitalization of $2.53 billion and daily transaction volumes of $52.36 million. Despite recent price declines, investors remain optimistic about the platform's technological advancements and expanded market accessibility features. The DAGKNIGHT consensus and Crescendo hard fork enable Kaspa to produce up to 10 blocks per second while maintaining high scalability standards. Additionally, the integration of KRC-20 tokens allows developers to build DeFi applications quickly.

Analysts have a bullish outlook on Kaspa's price. Crypto analyst Isai Alexei of Ethnews believes that the new upgrades have improved Kaspa's transaction processing capabilities. Changelly analysts agree that Kaspa will demonstrate powerful price growth in 2025. News Crypto expects Kaspa to surpass its previous high price point, with experts believing it has the potential to become a profitable asset this year.

Bonk Coin has also been gaining momentum, with its value moving on the daily charts and currently trading at $0.00001447. BONK's market worth relies on social media recognition, high investor demand, and expanding community sympathy. Research expert Bluntz predicts BONK token values will boost to $0.000033, anticipating a market value increase of 65%. CoinCodex's price projection indicates that BONK will achieve $0.00003795 in February 2025, demonstrating a potential value growth of 200%.

1Fuel has emerged as a prominent player in decentralized finance (DeFi) with its cross-chain transaction wallet and AI-powered trading functions. The platform prioritizes user privacy and security, offering a privacy mixer for anonymous deal settlements and military-grade core storage abilities. The upcoming 1Fuel Wallet Beta release aims to simplify operations for decentralized finance traders and position 1Fuel as a crucial force in expanding the crypto industry. Market
